onboarding.stationReady: Your station is ready for Agent.

welcome.title: Welcome to Mission Control
welcome.description: Your station for AI Agent. When Agent dock here, they gain persistent Bộ nhớ, task management, coordinated workflows, and full observability. We've scanned your setup — here's what's Trực tuyến.
welcome.monitorClaude: Giám sát Claude Code Phiên on this machine
welcome.taskTracking: Task tracking and Chi phí monitoring
welcome.memorySkills: Bộ nhớ, Kỹ năng, and inter-Agent comms
welcome.activeSessionsDetected: {count} active session{count, plural, one {} other {s}} detected
welcome.localModeNoGateway: Chế độ cục bộ — no Cổng

interfaceMode.title: Choose Your Station Layout
interfaceMode.description: Essential shows the core panels operators need most. Full unlocks every system on the station — Bộ nhớ, automation, Bảo mật auditing, and more. You can switch anytime.
interfaceMode.essentialDescription: Streamlined ops — the panels you'll use daily: fleet Tổng quan, Agent, Nhiệm vụ, chat, Hoạt động feed, Nhật ký, and Cài đặt.
interfaceMode.essentialPanels1: Fleet Tổng quan, Agent, Nhiệm vụ, Chat
interfaceMode.essentialPanels2: Hoạt động feed, Nhật ký, Cài đặt
interfaceMode.fullDescription: Full station access — adds Bộ nhớ browser, cron scheduling, webhooks, Cảnh báo, Bảo mật Kiểm toán, Chi phí tracking, and Cổng Cấu hình.
interfaceMode.fullPanels: Bộ nhớ, Cron, Webhooks, Kiểm toán

gatewayLink.title: Gateway Link
gatewayLink.description: Mission Control registers its origin with the OpenClaw Cổng so it can connect via WebSocket and manage Agent remotely.

credentials.title: Secure Your Station
credentials.description: The admin password protects your station console. The API key is a docking credential — Agent present it when they register, so only authorized Agent can dock.
credentials.passwordStrong: Password is strong and non-Mặc định
credentials.passwordWeak: Using a Mặc định or weak password — change AUTH_PASS in .env
credentials.apiKeyConfigured: Configured — Agent can dock using this key
credentials.apiKeyNotSet: Not set — Agent won't be able to dock without a configured key. Chạy: bash scripts/generate-env.sh --force
credentials.securityScanDescription: Verify Mạng, runtime, and OpenClaw hardening before you launch the station.
